name: Adjustable Bistro Table Off-White - Room Essentials™
description:
Upgrade the decor of your dorm or apartment with the Adjustable Dorm Bistro Table from Room Essentials™. This off-white bistro table is designed with a metal frame for a sleek look. It features an adjustable-height design for versatile use and built-in wheels for easy movement from one place to another.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
